meaning: n.骗子,卑鄙勾当,赝品,假珠宝adj.伪造的,不诚实的,卑鄙的,暗讽的
examples: Someone makes a snide comment; immediately you feel your anger take over.
Wintergreen was a snide little punk who enjoyed working at cross - purposes.
His snide remarks about people who make the honor roll are nothing but sour grapes.
Or rather, a snide connection between his short term outlook at his childlessness did.
Along the way, they deal with snide Vulcans, dangerous alien ecosystems, and insane Starfleet Commodores.
